description:
Time to Get Work: Are you ready to roar and get to work! Feel the power of the VEVOR wire stripping machine! It comes locked and loaded, featuring a powerful 750 W motor that saves you time and money. The gearbox leads to a fast stripping speed. It works at a shockingly fast stripping speed of 98 feet per minute, plus the hands-free design increases security and convenience. Widely used in cable/wire manufacturers, recycling plants, and copper products factories.

See and Focus: Looking for a wire stripping machine that will stand the test of time? Look no further than this baby! With a sturdy cast aluminum body and a clear acrylic panel, you'll be able to see exactly what's going on during the stripping process. Plus, its non-deformed structure means it'll keep going strong for years to come. Say goodbye to frustrating wire stripping experiences and hello to convenience and reliability!

Wide Compatibility: The VEVOR wire stripper machine has 10 stripping holes, including 10 channels and 10 blades. Adjust the blade to fit all wires with a diameter from 0.06'' (1.5 mm) to 1.57'' (40 mm). Suitable for handling hard cover wires, soft cover wires, multi-conductor wires, mono-filament wires, etc.
